factors.rationale: The products are visible but compete with the background and text.
The setting suggests a lifestyle but does not show a clear use moment.
The image clearly communicates waterproof and summer-ready benefits.
The layout is organized, making the text and products easy to read.
The products are clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
The brand name is visible, providing a credible trust signal.
The image has strong contrast and is easily readable.
